mlb.headline: JJ Wetherholt hits 2 homers as the Cardinals beat the Royals 12-10 to avoid a sweep

mlb.headline: Wyatt Langford hits 3-run homer as Rangers win 4-3 to end 6-series losing streak against Padres
mlb.summary: — Wyatt Langford hit a three-run homer, Josh Jung had a go-ahead RBI single and the Texas Rangers beat San Diego 4-3 on Sunday to end a six-series losing streak against the Padres.

nhl.headline: Kraken acquire Mackie Samoskevich in trade with Panthers
nhl.summary: The Kraken have acquired 23-year-old forward Mackie Samoskevich in a trade with the Panthers that will send the No. 25 pick in Friday's NHL draft back to Florida.

nhl.headline: Oilers re-sign Jason Dickinson to 5-year, $20M contract
nhl.summary: The Oilers have re-signed Jason Dickinson to a five-year contract worth $20 million, preventing the defensive-minded center from testing the free agent market.

nhl.headline: Hurricanes fans jam downtown Raleigh for Stanley Cup parade
nhl.summary: Thousands of Hurricanes fans crammed onto sidewalks, gathered around office building windows, even lined up on floor after floor of at least one parking deck to cheer and wave at the team's Stanley Cup championship parade Saturday.

nba.headline: CJ McCollum stays with Hawks on 1-year, $21M extension
nba.summary: Hawks guard CJ McCollum has agreed to a one-year, $21 million contract extension with the franchise, his agent told ESPN's Shams Charania.

nba.summary: The Suns have reached a second deal this weekend, as free agent guard Jordan Goodwin intends to join Collin Gillespie in re-signing in Phoenix, sources told ESPN.

wnba.headline: Clark leads Indiana against Phoenix after 26-point game
wnba.summary: Phoenix Mercury (5-12, 4-8 Western Conference) at Indiana Fever (9-7, 5-4 Eastern Conference)

wnba.headline: Bueckers fuels rally as Wings erase 15-point deficit in 4th
wnba.summary: The Wings exploded for a season-high 36 fourth-quarter points to rally from a 15-point deficit and stun the Sky 93-92.

wnba.headline: Li Yueru hits 2 late free throws as the Wings rally past the Sky 93-92
wnba.summary: — Li Yueru made two free throws with 12.5 seconds left to give Dallas its first lead as the Wings scored a season high 36 fourth-quarter points to rally from a 14-point deficit to beat the Chicago Sky 93-92 on Saturday night.

wnba.headline: Dallas Wings vs. Chicago Sky - Game Highlights
wnba.summary: Watch the Game Highlights from Dallas Wings vs. Chicago Sky, 06/20/2026

wnba.headline: Mercury end 4-game losing streak with 93-73 rout of reeling Storm
wnba.summary: — Valeriane Ayayi had 18 points and 10 rebounds and the Phoenix Mercury snapped a four-game losing streak by extending the Seattle Storm's skid to 10 straight in a 93-73 victory on Saturday.

wnba.headline: Reese reaches 1,000 career rebounds as Dream defeat Fever
wnba.summary: In her first season with Atlanta and third in the league, Angel Reese became the fastest in WNBA history to reach 1,000 career rebounds, reaching the milestone in her 79th game, as the Dream earned a 113-96 victory over the Fever.

wnba.headline: Mercury beat the Storm by 20 at home
wnba.summary: Mercury beat the Storm by 20 at home

wnba.headline: Dream set franchise record for points in a game in 113-96 win over Fever; Reese hits 1,000 rebounds
wnba.summary: — Rhyne Howard scored 24 points, Allisha Gray added 22, and the Atlanta Dream set a franchise record for points in a game with a 113-96 victory against Caitlin Clark and the Indiana Fever on Saturday.

wnba.headline: Olivia Miles has first dud as pro, but Lynx see chance to grow
wnba.summary: Olivia Miles was held to a season-low seven points on 1-of-10 shooting in an 81-75 win over the Valkyries, but the Lynx called the off night "a tremendous growth point" for the rookie sensation.

wnba.headline: Minnesota faces Washington, looks for 7th straight home win
wnba.summary: Washington Mystics (7-7, 6-4 Eastern Conference) at Minnesota Lynx (13-3, 9-1 Western Conference)

ncaab.headline: 2026 MCWS finals: Will Oklahoma's win or UNC's loss carry more of an emotional impact in Game 2?
ncaab.summary: Instead of dwelling on a win or loss, both UNC and Oklahoma are looking forward to Game 2.

ncaab.headline: Analyzing OU's 'it factor' performance in the MCWS Finals
ncaab.summary: SEC Network's David Dellucci and Todd Walker discuss what has clicked for the Sooners in the postseason and the shift in performance that has carried them all the way to the MCWS final.

ncaab.headline: Deiten Lachance relives his homers in OU's win vs. 5-seed North Carolina
ncaab.summary: Lachance reflects on his two home runs as he discusses how the Sooners rallied with momentum to defeat the Tar Heels in Game 1 of the MCWS championship series.

ncaab.headline: Harris, Walk detail how OU's fourth-inning momentum led to Game 1 win
ncaab.summary: Dasan Harris and Jason Walk describe the Sooners' energy shift in the fourth inning as they discuss the offensive factors that played a role in the win over 5-seed North Carolina.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Deiten Lachance's two homers power Oklahoma to Game 1 win in MCWS
ncaab.summary: Jason Walk and Kyle Branch bring in two runs apiece after Lachance goes yard twice as the Sooners take the first game of the MCWS from the Tar Heels, 9-3.

ncaab.headline: Oklahoma tops North Carolina in Game 1 of the MCWS finals
ncaab.summary: Deiten Lachance homered twice as the Sooners won Game 1 of the Men's College World Series finals 9-3 on Saturday to move within a victory of the national championship.

tennis.headline: Francisco Cerundolo beats Tommy Paul to win Queen's title
tennis.summary: Francisco Cerundolo of Argentina beat former champion Tommy Paul to win the Queen's final 6-7 (4), 6-4, 6-3.

tennis.headline: Frances Tiafoe beats Taylor Fritz to win all-American Halle final
tennis.summary: Frances Tiafoe beat fifth-seeded Taylor Fritz 6-4, 6-4 in an all-American final in Halle.

tennis.headline: Musetti withdraws from Wimbledon, opens space for Berrettini
tennis.summary: Lorenzo Musetti has pulled out of Wimbledon as he recovers from a left thigh injury.

tennis.headline: Venus, Serena Williams pairing among Wimbledon wild cards
tennis.summary: Venus and Serena Williams will play doubles at Wimbledon, teaming up for the first time since the 2022 US Open, where they lost their opening match.

tennis.headline: Ben Shelton beats Taylor Fritz for first grass-court title
tennis.summary: Ben Shelton defeated defending champion Taylor Fritz in an all-American final to win the Stuttgart Open.

tennis.headline: All England Club chair breaks down Wimbledon prize money
tennis.summary: All England Club chair breaks down Wimbledon prize money

f1.headline: Austrian Grand Prix 2026: Race start time, how to watch, full schedule, predictions
f1.summary: Formula 1 continues its run in Europe and heads to Austria to the Red Bull Ring for the eighth race of the season.

f1.headline: Mercedes opt not to pursue appeal into George Russell's Monaco GP penalties
f1.summary: Mercedes has withdrawn its attempt to challenge George Russell's costly Monaco Grand Prix penalties, saying Formula 1 and the FIA have shown sufficient determination to address the bizarre circumstances that led to the controversy.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton 'relentless' with changes at Ferrari, Fred Vasseur 'enabled them to happen'
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton has said Ferrari's first victory of the season would not have happened without a series of changes he pushed for behind the scenes, crediting team boss Fred Vasseur for backing his demands.

f1.headline: Red Bull join McLaren in appealing Pierre Gasly's reinstated podium - sources
f1.summary: McLaren has lodged a notification to appeal with the FIA's International Court of Appeal over the decision to rescind Pierre Gasly's speeding penalties at the Monaco Grand Prix and reinstate the Alpine driver on the podium.

f1.headline: F1 on track to hit net zero target after 35% reduction in carbon footprint
f1.summary: Formula 1 says it remains on track to achieve its target of becoming net zero by 2030 after reporting a 35% reduction in its carbon footprint compared to 2018.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton lauds connection with new Ferrari engineer Carlo Santi
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton has praised his Ferrari race engineer Carlo Santi, comparing the connection he has built with the Italian to the one he famously had with his long-time Mercedes race engineer Peter Bonnington.

football.headline: Will the Patriots keep seven wide receivers on their roster?
football.summary: Former Patriot Troy Brown evaluates the Patriots' most crowded position going into training camp.

football.headline: How Titans' Saleh is living father's dream as an NFL coach
football.summary: Tennessee's newest coach is making his father, Sam, proud.

football.headline: Top five takeaways from Commanders offseason practices
football.summary: Washington had plenty of positives after spring practices, but big questions remain.

football.headline: Does Brendan Sorsby and the supplemental draft affect the Jets?
football.summary: New York traded for Geno Smith this offseason, but could Sorsby be a possible solution long term?

football.headline: Philadelphia Eagles' Uar Bernard says Nigeria has NFL talent in abundance
football.summary: Philadelphia Eagles rookie Uar Bernard believes Nigeria is filled with athletes capable of reaching the NFL, and wants the league to do more to create pathways for these young players to be discovered and developed.

football.summary: A long-standing practice in the collectibles industry is under the microscope.
